AccessGrantsInstanceId.description: The ID of the S3 Access Grants instance.

AccessGrantsInstanceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the S3 Access Grants instance.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time when the instance was created.

IdentityCenterArn.description: If you associated your S3 Access Grants instance with an IAM Identity Center instance, this field returns the ARN of the IAM Identity Center instance application.
